data.title: Bixike Girls Bike with Basket for Toddlers and Kids Aged 3-14 Years Old, 12 14 16 18 Inch with Training Wheels & Doll Seat, 2

features: Size and Design: Bixike kids bike is designed specifically for children and comes in a size suitable for their age and height. The bike features sturdy frame
and adjustable saddle and handlebars to ensure a comfortable fit.Pink Purple Green optional.
Safety Features: Safety is a top priority for Bixike girl bikes
and they come equipped with several features to protect children while they ride. These include training wheels for beginners
front caliper brakes and coaster brakes for easy stopping
and non-slip pedals to keep their feet in place.
Durability: the kids bikes are built to last
with high-quality components and materials that can withstand the wear and tear of regular use. They feature rust-resistant chains
and strong steel frames to ensure they can handle rough terrain and adventurous kids.

Age and Height Range: The 14" bike is designed for kids 3-5 years old or 37-45 inches tall. The 16" bike is designed for kids 4-8 years old or 41-51 inches tall.The 18" bike is designed for kids 9-12 years old or 49-57 inches tall.The 20" bike is designed for kids 12-14 years old or 51-61 inches tall.
Ease of Use: the bikes are easy to assemble
with tools and instructions included. They are also lightweight
making them easy for kids to maneuver and ride without too much effort. Additionally
they are typically easy to clean and maintain
making them a great investment for parents looking for a reliable and convenient kids bike.

relatedProducts.Title: Glerc Petal Girls Bike 12-18 Inch for Ages 2-9, Kids Bike with Training Wheels, Basket & Streamers, Princess Style Kids Bicycle, for Girls
relatedProducts.Features: 【Built for A Little Princess】Flowing streamers and an adorable doll seat create a magical and eye-catching look she'll love. The girls bike is the ultimate birthday surprise and a dream gift to inspire the imagination! | 【Easy Stopping Power】Features a dual-brake safety system(coaster brake + hand brake), petal kids bike giving your child two reliable ways to slow down and stop. This dependable control builds confidence and makes every ride safer for new riders. | 【Friendly Design】The kids bicycle features easy-to-grip aluminum brakes(designed for little hands!), a low straddle frame for easy boarding, and a height-adjustable seat to ensure a comfortable, stable and confident riding experience. | 【Size Guide】This 14 inch bike is suitable for children ages 3-5, 36"-44" tall, with an inseam height of 16"-20". The bike weighs 24 lbs. Please focus on your child's height and inseam to choose the size. | 【Easy to Install】Girls bike come with an 85% pre-assembled body and basic assembly tools, so you can add just a few parts to the bike and have it assembled in just 25 minutes.
